brief_notes: Very strong paper. Numbers verified: 11 rats, 14+14 sessions, 0.69+-0.32 um, 0.43+-0.45/min, 1.0+-0.20/min, 2.8+-1.7->-6.0+-2.0, 4.1+-1.9->-9.0+-1.9, 8.1+-7.0, 4.8+-2.9, 136%, 895 voxels, 2-5 Hz, 7-12 Hz, 260+-21g. Named citations (gotman2005, meeren2002, chipaux2013, etc.). Excellent prose with smooth transitions. Unified voice throughout.
